summary: Good audience‑sourced recording captures a strong set highlighted by an unforgettable China Doll and scorching Althea/Let It Grow combo.
review: The show is praised for its vibrant first set and a standout China Doll that many reviewers call the greatest ever, plus hot performances of Althea, Let It Grow and Friend of the Devil. The source appears to be an audience/matrix tape with solid clarity thanks to quality mics and noise‑reduction, though no reviewer calls it flawless.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the performance highly (4–5 stars) and cite several standout songs, while recording comments are generally positive but lack detailed technical assessment; one outlier low rating keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recorded with Audio‑Technica 811 mics and JVC KD‑2 noise reduction (super A.N.R.S.), noted as clearer than typical Dolby B decks; reviewers mention crisp first‑set sound.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as especially crisp; second set includes a scorching LIG>Deal combo and the celebrated China Doll, giving the concert a strong overall flow.
